steps.title: Substitute point (0, -6) to find B
steps.content:
Since the line passes through $(0, -6)$, this point must satisfy $Ax + By = 11$. Substituting $x = 0$ and $y = -6$ eliminates the $A$ term:
$$A(0) + B(-6) = 11$$
$$-6B = 11$$
$$B = -\frac{11}{6}$$
That matches Choice B — $-\frac{11}{6}$.
